items.title: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time

source.notes: Verified recent sold listings captured from the PriceCharting Nintendo 64 page on 2026-03-14. Imported 10 yearly history points for 2016-2025 using yearly averages from the embedded chart_data used-series. Current guide on that page also listed Loose $48.95, Complete $152.99, New $441.56.

notes: Use only verified sources.
Snapshot prices below are local references only; do not treat them as verified sales history.
